Technology

Meningkatkan Produktivitas dengan Claude Code

2026-04-25 • Muhdan Fyan Syah Sofian

Claude Code: "Partner Nyata" di Terminal—Bukan Sekadar Chatbot Biasa! 🚀

📅 25 April 2026

Pernah merasa lelah bolak-balik antara Browser (ChatGPT/Claude web) dan Terminal cuma buat copy-paste kode? Di komunitas developer Indonesia, efisiensi adalah segalanya. Kita butuh tool yang nggak cuma pinter teori, tapi bisa langsung "eksekusi". Itulah kenapa Claude Code jadi pembicaraan hangat belakangan ini.

🇮🇩 Kenapa Ini Cocok Banget Buat Developer Kita?

Berdasarkan tips dari Boris Cherny (sang kreator), saya mencoba membedah kenapa tool ini bakal mengubah cara kita nge-code.

  1. Ringan & "Sat-set": Buat kita yang mungkin spek laptopnya terbatas atau sering pake Termux, Claude Code jauh lebih ringan dibanding harus buka IDE berat plus browser.
  2. Solusi "Marbot IT" & Freelancer: Kadang kita harus benerin bug sambil di jalan. Dengan fitur Dispatch, kita bisa kontrol proses coding di PC rumah cuma lewat HP. 📱
  3. Hemat Kuota: Karena berbasis teks di terminal, data yang ditukar jauh lebih kecil.

💡 Tips Pro: Melampaui Batas Chatbot

"Claude Code bukan asisten yang cuma bisa jawab pertanyaan, dia adalah Agent yang punya 'tangan' buat ngetik dan 'kaki' buat jalan di direktori proyek kita."

1. Gunakan /btw untuk "OOT" yang Berfaedah

Lagi asik suruh Claude bikin API, tiba-tiba lupa nama interface? Gunakan /btw (By The Way). Claude bakal jawab tanpa ngerusak task utama yang lagi jalan.

2. /loop: Biarkan Claude Jadi Penjaga Malam

Bikin script tapi sering crash? Pake /loop buat mantau log. Claude bakal kasih tahu kalau ada yang aneh.

3. Visual Verification (Eyes on the Code)

Claude sekarang punya "mata" lewat ekstensi Chrome. Dia bisa buka web buatan dia sendiri dan langsung benerin kodenya. Real-time self-correction!

🛠️ Intip Rahasianya di Repository Saya

Saya sudah merangkum semua pemahaman teknis, contoh konfigurasi settings.json, dan panduan Skills.

👉 Cek di sini: muhdanfyan/claude-code-tips

Sumber: XDA Developers | Penulis: Muhdan Fyan Syah Sofian Ditulis dengan penuh semangat menggunakan Gemini CLI

Claude Code: A "Real Partner" in the Terminal—Not Just Your Average Chatbot! 🚀

📅 April 25, 2026

Ever felt tired of switching back and forth between your Browser (ChatGPT/Claude web) and your Terminal just to copy-paste code? In the Indonesian developer community, efficiency is everything. We need a tool that isn't just smart in theory, but can "execute" directly. That's why Claude Code has become a hot topic recently.

🇮🇩 Why This is a Perfect Fit for Our Developers?

Based on tips from Boris Cherny (the creator), I've tried to break down why this tool is going to change the way we code.

  1. Lightweight & Fast: For those of us whose laptop specs might be limited or who frequently use Termux, Claude Code is much lighter than having to open a heavy IDE plus a browser.
  2. Solution for "IT Marbots" & Freelancers: Sometimes we have to fix bugs while on the go. With the Dispatch feature, we can control the coding process on our home PC just through our smartphone. 📱
  3. Data Saving: Because it's text-based in the terminal, the data exchanged is much smaller.

💡 Pro Tips: Beyond Chatbot Limits

"Claude Code isn't an assistant that can only answer questions; it's an Agent that has 'hands' to type and 'feet' to walk through our project directories."

1. Use /btw for Useful "OOT"

In the middle of asking Claude to build an API, suddenly forgot an interface name? Use /btw (By The Way). Claude will answer without disrupting the main task currently running.

2. /loop: Let Claude Be the Night Watchman

Created a script but it crashes often? Use /loop to monitor logs. Claude will let you know if anything is amiss.

3. Visual Verification (Eyes on the Code)

Claude now has "eyes" via a Chrome extension. It can open a web page it created itself and fix the code directly. Real-time self-correction!

🛠️ Peek at the Secrets in My Repository

I have summarized all technical understandings, settings.json configuration examples, and Skills guides.

👉 Check it out here: muhdanfyan/claude-code-tips

Source: XDA Developers | Author: Muhdan Fyan Syah Sofian Written with enthusiasm using Gemini CLI
